name: CIW Web Foundations Associate
exam_format: CBT; ~90 items across 3 domains; 90 min; Pearson VUE
notes: Composite exam: Internet Business + Site Dev + Network Tech. $175. 3-year renewal. Most common web credential in U.S. CTE.

name: CIW Site Development Associate
notes: HTML/CSS/web publishing. Can be standalone or part of Web Foundations composite. $175.

name: CIW Advanced HTML5 & CSS3 Specialist
exam_format: CBT; 55 items; 75 min; MC + simulation; Pearson VUE
notes: First step in CIW Web & Mobile Design series. 72.73% passing. $175.

name: CIW User Interface Designer
cross_cutting_tags: Arts Entertainment & Design → Design & Digital Arts
notes: Successor to CIW Web Design Specialist (1D0-520). UI/UX principles; wireframing. 74% passing. $175.

name: CIW JavaScript Specialist
exam_format: CBT; 50-55 items; 75 min; MC + scenario; Pearson VUE
notes: DOM + events + forms + debugging. Cross-cuts Software Solutions. $175.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: HTML and CSS
notes: Entry-level. Strong HS fit. Replaces MTA 98-383. 5-year validity. ~$100 voucher.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: HTML5 Application Development
notes: HTML5 + CSS + JS for responsive apps. Replaces MTA 98-375. ~$100 voucher.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: JavaScript
notes: Entry JS. Replaces MTA 98-382. Cross-cuts Software Solutions. ~$100 voucher.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: Cloud Computing
notes: Vendor-neutral cloud fundamentals. Strong HS entry. ~$100 voucher.

name: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
exam_format: CBT; 65 items; 90 min; MC + multiple-response; Pearson VUE
notes: $100. No prerequisites. Strongest HS-viable cloud credential. 700/1000 passing. 3-year validity.

name: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate
notes: $150. Recommends 1+ yr experience. PS-dominant. 3-year validity.

name: Microsoft Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
notes: 700/1000 passing. Free with MS Imagine Academy. Cross-cuts IT Support. Vendor-specific (Azure).

name: Microsoft Azure Administrator (AZ-104)
notes: $165. Azure admin expertise required. PS-dominant.

name: Google Cloud Digital Leader
notes: $99. Non-technical fundamentals. No experience required. Free to CTE schools via Google Career Certificates. Weaker state-list penetration.

name: Google Cloud Associate Cloud Engineer
notes: $200. 6+ months GCP experience recommended. PS-dominant. 2-year validity.

name: CompTIA Cloud+
exam_format: CBT; up to 90 items; 90 min; Pearson VUE
notes: 750/900 passing. ~$369. Vendor-neutral. 2-3 yrs experience recommended. PS-dominant.

name: Microsoft 365 Fundamentals (MS-900)
notes: 700/1000 passing. Cross-cuts IT Support. Free with Imagine Academy.

name: Adobe Certified Professional in Web Authoring (Dreamweaver)
cross_cutting_tags: Arts Entertainment & Design → Design & Digital Arts
notes: Still active but declining market relevance as Dreamweaver usage shrinks. $150. Valid 3 years.

name: Meta Front-End Developer Professional Certificate
notes: No proctored exam. Covers HTML/CSS/JS/React. Strong portfolio value but structural mismatch with CTE accountability.

name: Google UX Design Professional Certificate
cross_cutting_tags: Arts Entertainment & Design → Design & Digital Arts
exam_format: Course completion; 7 courses; 200+ hrs; NOT proctored
notes: ACE recommends 10 college credits. Free to CTE HS via Google Career Certificates. Ohio 2 pts. No proctored exam.

name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Foundations Associate
exam_format: CBT; 55 items; 85 min; Pearson VUE; online proctored
notes: 68% passing. $150. Lifetime validity. Low CTE penetration. Niche.
